name: rustdecimal CrateDepression (Mythic Poseidon Agent)
description: Typosquat of rust_decimal Cargo crate. Detects GitLab CI and deploys Mythic Poseidon agent (Go-based C2 implant) targeting CI/CD pipelines.

affected_packages.name: rustdecimal
affected_packages.note: Entirely malicious typosquat. Legitimate package is rust_decimal (with underscore).

remediation: Remove rustdecimal from Cargo.toml - use rust_decimal instead
Audit CI/CD pipelines for unauthorized binaries
Rotate GitLab CI tokens and secrets
